creator: marius@alchemy.franken.de
text:
Please grab the following kernel:
http://people.freebsd.org/~marius/kernel.debug.bz2
That is a kernel built from the 9.0-R sources but with debugging
symbols. You could also build such a kernel yourself and provide
me with the resulting binary instead, this way around is just to
save some time. Please boot it and when it crashes enter 'ctrace'
and 'ftrace' on the OBP promt and provide me with the output of
each of these commands. This probably is most easily done using
a serial console.

Marius
